purpose: A9 Unity target-repo adapter. Structured description of the Unity target repository so the orchestrator routes Unity work through one declared adapter instead of hardcoded hints. load_unity_target() reads this once (inline default fallback if missing); unity_target_summary() emits a compact view for the capsule/UI. Read-only contract data; surfacing it on GET writes nothing (A1).
verification_commands_note: templates — replace `Unity` with the resolved 6000.4.6f1 editor executable path; BuildScript.Build is a placeholder build entry point.
_note: known_missing_systems to be populated from original sc-spire parity analysis
